title: capnites erythrocarpus
intro: Capnites erythrocarpus, also known as red spurry, is a plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a flowering plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. Capnites erythrocarpus is often used in traditional medicine to promote digestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
